name: Siri
title_tag: Manage Your Business information on Siri with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Siri + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Siri with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Siri?

Siri is a widely recognized virtual assistant and voice-activated AI developed by Apple. It assists users with tasks, answers questions, and provides voice-activated control of various Apple devices and services, making it a valuable tool for streamlining digital interactions.

Why Siri + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Siri, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Siri through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Siri.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Siri, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Siri + Synup?

The Siri integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Siri integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Siri logo to manage the Synup + Siri integration and associated settings.

seo.title: Siri
seo.description: Optimize your business on Siri. Synup integration ensures accurate information for seamless interactions and heightened online visibility.
